name: Pistachio Pudding Dessert
recipeIngredient: 7 oz (2 boxes) Pistachio Ins Pudding Mix
7 oz (2 boxes) Heath candy bars, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pudding mix according to package directions using 3 cups of milk.
2. Place half the ladyfingers in the bottom of a 9 X 13 inch glass dish.
3. Add half the prepared pudding and half the Cool Whip on top of the ladyfingers.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Crumble 3-4 Heath candy bars over the top layer.
6. Refrigerate until serving.
